'''''Stimsenj'kat''''' was an [[MC80 Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 Star Cruiser]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the ''Stimsenj'kat'' led a retrieval mission in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field to obtain a large supply of [[lonsigar]] that had been abandoned in a pair of [[Cargo container/Legends|cargo containers]]. The vessel deployed six [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|''Delta''-class DX-9 stormtrooper transports]] from [[Renhoek (transports)|''Renhoek'']] group to unload the containers and bring back the lonsigar.

Unfortunately, the operation turned out to be an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] trap when three [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|Nebulon-B frigates]] came out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] and launched waves of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE Bombers]], and [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avengers]] to exterminate the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]].

Fortunately, Rebel pilot [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and the other pilots destroyed most of the Imperial forces and bought the ''Stimsenj'kat'' the time it needed to finish the cargo transfer and to flee into hyperspace.

==Behind the scenes==
The name ''Stimsenj'kat'' is similar to "Stimpson J. Cat," a lead character from the cartoon series ''[[Wikipedia:The Ren & Stimpy Show|Ren & Stimpy]]''. The name of the cruiser's transport group ''Renhoek'' is similar to "Ren Höek," the series' other lead character.

[[File:XW_MC80a.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A mislabeled MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]]
Although the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruisers]] featured in [[Star Wars: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: X-Wing: Collector's CD-ROM'']] are identified in-game as [[MC80a Star Cruiser]]s, they are visually modeled on the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]]<ref name="XWC">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM|''Star Wars: X-Wing'' Collector's CD-ROM]]</ref> seen in [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']].<ref name="ROTJ">{{Film|VI}}</ref>
